creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 233029
"git diff" to update the port

- update 0.011 -> 0.012
- Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/release/LEONT/Crypt-Argon2-0.012

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
12.2-RELEASE-p10
pkg 1.17.5
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
